description_long: This is a modern, rectangular school building with a flat roof, featuring a large central courtyard or open area on the rooftop, possibly used as a recreational or assembly space. The structure is surrounded by a dense arrangement of trees, providing a natural buffer and shade around the premises. The building facade is characterized by horizontal bands of windows and a mix of light-colored and brick-like exterior materials. There are multiple access points and terraces, with some outdoor seating or gathering areas visible on the roof. The grounds include a large green lawn adjacent to the building, separated from the main structure by a row of trees. The overall design emphasizes openness, accessibility, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, flat-roofed school building with rooftop open space, surrounded by dense trees and a large adjacent lawn. The structure features horizontal windows, terraces, and a blend of light and brick-like materials.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main facade of the school, the rooftop open area, and a dense row of trees in the foreground with a green lawn extending to the left.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the depth of the building, rooftop terraces, and the separation between the school and the tree-covered lawn area.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the long side of the building, the rooftop courtyard, and a continuous line of trees with the green lawn at the far right.
description_view_3: This angled view emphasizes the rooftop open space, terraces, and the spatial relationship between the school, the trees, and the adjacent lawn.
